boundary_binding.action_boundary: customer authorization boundary closed by signed mandate
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Not permitted; boundary remains open before execution
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Unmatched or missing mandate blocks execution
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: mandate signature must match account and action

critical_features_preserved: mandate signature must match account and action
final_answer: Action may not proceed. The controlling control record says the required mandate signature is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped to a different action, so the exact customer authorization boundary is not closed. Policy requires exact source-record closure before execution. Escalate to resolve the signature and account/action match.
